cause_analysis.narrative: Beauty By Naomi churned on 2026-02-02 after 426 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-23 via app_chat — 41 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 41 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

To overcome the negative reviews, we can either report the negative review or get 5-10x of the positive reviews.

However, before we end the conversation or the subscription, I would really appreciate the opportunity to walk you through the answers and action plans for everything mentioned…
